channel.title: General Bots Blog
channel.description: AI, multi-agent orchestration, LLMs and open-source insights

item.title: Carl vs Wilson: Two Paths for AI in Your Enterprise
item.description: Comparing Carl and Wilson approaches to AI strategy in the enterprise.

item.description: Why owning your authenticator is critical for sovereign AI infrastructure.

item.title: The LLM Boom is Over: What Comes Next
item.description: Analysis of post-boom LLM landscape and what it means for enterprise AI.

item.title: Breaking Free from Proprietary Ecosystems
item.description: How to decouple from Big Tech AI vendors and build sovereign solutions.

item.title: Digital Twins for Enterprise AI
item.description: Using digital twins to simulate and optimize enterprise AI workflows.

item.title: Standardized AI Templates
item.description: Reusable AI templates for rapid enterprise automation deployment.

item.title: BASIC for Everyone: Making AI Accessible
item.description: Reviving BASIC for the LLM era — democratizing AI programming.

item.title: Cost-Effective Bot Orchestration
item.description: Optimizing multi-agent orchestration costs without sacrificing performance.

item.title: MCP Is the New API
item.description: Model Context Protocol as the next evolution of API design for AI.

item.title: Beyond Chatbots: The Future of Enterprise AI
item.description: Moving past simple chatbots to autonomous AI agents.

item.title: What Is an LLM? A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Complete guide to large language models and their enterprise applications.

item.title: LLM Myths 2025: Separating Fact from Fiction
item.description: Debunking common myths about LLMs in enterprise environments.

item.title: The Illusion of Intelligence in LLMs
item.description: Understanding the difference between simulation and genuine intelligence.

item.title: The Hidden Costs of Enterprise SaaS
item.description: Why SaaS total cost of ownership often exceeds on-premise alternatives.

item.title: NO FORMS: Conversational AI That Works
item.description: Eliminating forms with conversational AI interfaces.

item.title: RCS vs WhatsApp: The Battle for Business Messaging
item.description: Comparing RCS and WhatsApp for enterprise customer communication.

item.title: Building LLM-Powered Enrollment Tools with BASIC
item.description: Using BASIC to build LLM-powered enrollment and registration tools.

item.title: Protocol Imperialism: The OAuth2 Trap
item.description: How protocol imperialism locks enterprises into proprietary ecosystems.

item.title: Economic Impact of US Tariffs on AI
item.description: Analyzing how US tariffs affect the global AI supply chain.

item.title: Deswindonization: Breaking Free from Big Tech
item.description: Strategy for systematically removing Big Tech dependencies.

item.title: SDG & AI: Sustainable Development Goals
item.description: How AI can accelerate progress toward UN Sustainable Development Goals.

item.title: Why Pragmatismo Selected Open Source
item.description: Why Pragmatismo chose open source for sovereign AI infrastructure.
